data.content:
Implementation complete on worktree branch.

Commit: 29c4d824d80cea227e97fd3640b2cd6f75bfbe1d
Files:
- src/components/agent-history-session-card.tsx — replaced buildAgentLabel with formatAgentDisplayLabel; preserves undefined-when-empty UX via explicit guard.
- src/components/agent-history-utils.tsx — deleted buildAgentLabel and dropped now-unused formatModelDisplay import from @/hooks/use-agent-info.

Acceptance:
1. agent-history-utils.tsx no longer contains a parallel implementation. PASS.
2. Caller migrated to formatAgentDisplayLabel from @/lib/agent-identity. PASS.
3. grep for buildAgentLabel returns zero hits across src/. PASS (verified).
4. Existing tests pass. PASS (310 files / 3095 tests green).

Output format note: buildAgentLabel produced 'Claude · Opus 4.7' (· separator). formatAgentDisplayLabel produces 'Claude Opus 4.7' (space separator). This is the canonical format per the contract; no test asserted on the dot separator.
